'''Zoronhed''' was one of the largest settlements established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonju V]].

==History==
During the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] [[Disciples of Ragnos crisis|crisis]], a [[Unidentified spaceport worker|spaceport worker]] on the planet had information pertaining to the Disciples of Ragnos and its connection with the [[Imperial Remnant]]. The worker was hiding at an abandoned outpost three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] outside of Zoronhed. [[Jaden Korr]] traveled to [[Mission to Zonju V|meet]] up with the worker and find out what he had to say, but was hindered by [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop mercenaries]] in the process, resulting in the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of the associate before he could divulge anything of use to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
